description: MCP server for Festo/CODESYS PLCs: IEC 61131-3 ST + validated PLCopen XML generation.
name: io.github.efranceschetti/festo-codesys-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Absolute path to CODESYS.exe — enables the 12 ide_* tools that drive a live CODESYS V3.5 instance (Windows only).
environmentVariables.name: FESTO_MCP_CODESYS_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Required when using the ide_* tools. CODESYS profile name exactly as shown in the CODESYS version selector.
environmentVariables.name: FESTO_MCP_CODESYS_PROFILE

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Python interpreter for the XSD/semantic validators and hardware tools (needs lxml).
environmentVariables.name: FESTO_MCP_PYTHON

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Set to 1 to enable the cpx_*/edcon_* hardware commissioning tools (bench use only).
environmentVariables.name: FESTO_MCP_ENABLE_HARDWARE

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Set to 1 to allow file-writing tools to write outside the workspace directory.
environmentVariables.name: FESTO_MCP_ALLOW_OUTSIDE_WORKSPACE
